legacy.content:
# Phase 30-05 Plan: First-Person 3-Column Layout
## Objective
Bring first-person mode to the same 3-column layout as grid: left nav, center narrative, right journal.
## Tasks
1. Extract shared layout constants (`layout-constants.ts`) 2. Move `hasEncounter`, `inRuneForgeContext` to `scene-blocks.ts` for reuse 3. Refactor first-person scene to use 3-column layout (left nav, center look, right stats + journal) 4. Remove legacy full-width layout from first-person
## Files
- `packages/kaplay-demo/src/layout-constants.ts` (new) - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/scene-blocks.ts` — add hasEncounter, inRuneForgeContext - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/first-person.ts` — 3-column layout - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/grid.ts` — import from layout-constants, scene-blocks
